/usr/bin/c++  -O2 -fPIC -fstack-protector-strong -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -pipe -fvisibility=hidden  -Wl,-z,relro,-z,now -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/get_fingerprint.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/get_fingerprint.dir/tools/get_fingerprint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/get_fingerprint.dir/src/fingerprint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/get_fingerprint.dir/src/tpm_attest.cpp.o -o get_fingerprint  /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so -ltss2-esys -ltss2-mu -ltss2-rc -ltss2-tctildr
